title: Senior Financial Analyst - Star Health Insurance - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Star Health Insurance - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Star Health Insurance in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Star Health Insurance:
Star Health Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
